shared_properties: The prism obeys the package palette discipline and uses hard, readable highlight edges rather than soft smears.
The transparent silhouette is authored for Bevy sprite compositing above world tiles and below UI.
Gold hardware echoes the mirror frame so both movable optical objects feel like one puzzle system.
differences: The body is wider and more compact than the mirror because it communicates splitting rather than directional reflection.
Amber refraction accents appear inside the core to forecast multi-beam output.
No rotation markers are shown because the gameplay rule explicitly keeps the prism orientation fixed.

reference_images.label: gdd_markdown
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the shadow survival loop, mirror and prism puzzle rules, scale targets, HUD placements, and Bevy runtime constraints for Umbra Scale.

reference_images.label: moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the twilight art deco tower mood, silhouette contrast, gold trims, and hard-edge lighting style.

bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load prism_splitter_glass.png during Loading and tag it with a non-rotating split profile so runtime beam systems can emit three fixed 120 degree paths.
runtime_notes: Do not rotate the prism at runtime; the art already encodes the canonical split orientation expected by the puzzle design.
Keep the body silhouette compact enough to sit on narrow scale plates without covering weight readouts.
Use alpha-preserving edge highlights so the prism reads as glass even over bright beam intersections.

context.usage: Placed where one incoming beam must split into three readable channels for multi-switch and multi-scale puzzles.

readability_notes: The center core is bright enough to imply refraction even before beams hit it.
Three edge normals are visually distinct so players can predict split directions from the art alone.
The glass body keeps crisp triangular faces without any rounded cartoon corners.

acceptance_criteria: Canvas is exactly 96x96 px with the prism centered and no transparent padding larger than 8 px on any edge.
Three face directions remain readable at 50% preview scale without UI labels.
The glass core preserves contrast over both Void Black and Exposure White test swatches.
